title: Exceptions
doc_html:
§1133.12. Exceptions

            This Part shall not apply to the practice of emergency medical services by a legally qualified emergency medical services practitioner who is employed by the United States government, or by any bureau, division, or agency thereof, while in the discharge of his official duties.

            Acts 1997, No. 913, §2; Acts 2012, No. 789, §2, eff. June 13, 2012; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1232.11 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1133.12.  Exceptions
This Part shall not apply to the practice of emergency medical services by a legally
qualified emergency medical services practitioner who is employed by the United States
government, or by any bureau, division, or agency thereof, while in the discharge of his
official duties.
Acts 1997, No. 913, §2; Acts 2012, No. 789, §2, eff. June 13, 2012; Redesignated
from R.S. 40:1232.11 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
